vc_checking.summary: The sole target VC is semantically provable. Choose either identical disjunct (the right branch is simplest), instantiate xizi_dll's first node with linklist_node_pre, and fold the exposed next.prev cell together with xizi_dll_rest into xizi_dll_tail. A case split on l closes both the empty sentinel-ring and nonempty-ring shapes using only definition unfolding, existential instantiation, equality rewriting, and separation cancellation.

vc_shape.pre_spatial: anchor.next |-> linklist_node_pre ** next.prev |-> linklist_node_pre ** linklist_node_pre.next |-> next ** linklist_node_pre.prev |-> anchor ** xizi_dll_rest anchor next l
vc_shape.pre_exists: Existentials are internal to xizi_dll_rest when l is nonempty: its head-successor address and the recursively owned tail.
vc_shape.post_spatial: xizi_dll anchor (linklist_node_pre :: l), which unfolds to anchor.next |-> linklist_node_pre ** linklist_node_pre.prev |-> anchor ** linklist_node_pre.next |-> next ** xizi_dll_tail next linklist_node_pre anchor l after existential choices.
vc_shape.post_pure: The unfolded cons case requires the reflexive head equality linklist_node_pre = linklist_node_pre; unfolding xizi_dll_tail additionally reuses the equality carried by xizi_dll_rest for the head or sentinel case.
vc_shape.post_exists: Choose xizi_dll.first = linklist_node_pre and the new head's successor = next; in the nonempty l case reuse the successor existential already stored in xizi_dll_rest.

witnesses.witness_instantiation: Select the right-hand disjunct of the generated disjunction. Instantiate xizi_dll's outer first address with linklist_node_pre and the cons-case xizi_dll_rest successor with next. If l = x :: xs, preserve the existential successor from the old xizi_dll_rest unchanged.
witnesses.space_plan: Unfold xizi_dll and the cons case of xizi_dll_rest. Cancel anchor.next, linklist_node_pre.prev, and linklist_node_pre.next directly. It remains to show next.prev ** xizi_dll_rest anchor next l entails xizi_dll_tail next linklist_node_pre anchor l. Destruct l. For nil, xizi_dll_rest supplies next = anchor and emp, so rewrite next to anchor and cancel the owned next.prev field against anchor.prev. For x :: xs, xizi_dll_rest supplies next = x and EX successor, next.next plus xizi_dll_tail successor next anchor xs; combine those resources with the separately owned next.prev field and fold the cons case of xizi_dll_tail.
witnesses.pure_plan: The generated non-null hypotheses are not needed for this representation-folding entailment. The only required equalities are reflexivity for the inserted head and the head/sentinel equality exposed by xizi_dll_rest after the l case split; these are discharged by substitution/entailer after unfolding, not by an unqualified arithmetic tactic.
witnesses.refinement_plan: Not applicable: this is a direct separation-logic representation entailment with no safeExec or abstract program-state transition.

premise_discharge.premise: next = anchor in the l = nil branch
premise_discharge.discharged_by: the pure conjunct of xizi_dll_rest anchor next nil

premise_discharge.premise: next = x in the l = x :: xs branch
premise_discharge.discharged_by: the pure conjunct of xizi_dll_rest anchor next (x :: xs)

premise_discharge.premise: the recursive tail has predecessor next
premise_discharge.discharged_by: the xizi_dll_tail successor next anchor xs resource already owned inside the nonempty xizi_dll_rest branch

premise_discharge.premise: the new predecessor field of next is linklist_node_pre
premise_discharge.discharged_by: the explicit next.prev |-> linklist_node_pre resource in the VC precondition

witnesses.grouping_reason: The only target is a representation-folding proof for the post-store doubly linked ring; no unrelated proof pattern or dependency justifies another group.

analysis_groups.shared_proof_pattern: Unfold the complete-ring postcondition, choose the inserted node and old next address as existentials, then case-split the old abstract sequence and fold xizi_dll_tail from xizi_dll_rest plus the exposed predecessor cell.
analysis_groups.shared_space_plan: Direct cancellation followed by one l case split and recursive predicate folding.
analysis_groups.shared_pure_plan: Use only equalities exposed by xizi_dll_rest and reflexivity.
analysis_groups.grouping_reason: One proofable witness, one coherent direct spatial reassembly pattern, and target count 1 is within the controller limit 12.

proof_groups.natural_language_proof_strategy: Select the right identical disjunct; introduce parameters; unfold xizi_dll; instantiate first with linklist_node_pre; unfold the cons xizi_dll_rest; instantiate its successor with next; cancel the three immediately matching field cells; destruct l; unfold xizi_dll_rest and xizi_dll_tail in each branch; reuse the exposed pure equality and existential successor, then finish by separation cancellation/entailer. No helper lemma is needed.
proving_hints: The goal definition is a disjunction of identical entailments, so choosing the right branch avoids proving both.
The structural core is next.prev ** xizi_dll_rest anchor next l |-- xizi_dll_tail next linklist_node_pre anchor l.
Case split l before fully simplifying xizi_dll_rest/xizi_dll_tail; nil uses next = anchor, cons reuses the rest predicate's existential successor.
Do not add a helper unless direct unfolding/cancellation unexpectedly exposes a tactic-level issue; the mathematical entailment needs none.
proof_groups.grouping_reason: This single witness is below max_witnesses_per_group=12 and has one self-contained spatial folding strategy with no dependencies.

reference_evidence.reusable_pattern: The declared single-link reference also proves insert-after by folding a cons-shaped representation after preprocessing; the present doubly-linked case requires an explicit l case split because xizi_dll_rest exposes next.prev separately.

major_time_sinks: reading the complete workflow and VC-checking rule set
checking all declared source and generated-file digests
expanding the three case predicates for empty and nonempty abstract sequences
timing.timing_gap_reason: The handoff did not provide a subagent start timestamp, and individual read/analysis activities were not ledgered before they began; no elapsed value is fabricated.
